description: Checklist for DeFi connectors/adapters that hold, stake, borrow, lend, or price positions in external protocols.
core_invariants: connector-reported TVL must equal the external protocol ground truth owned by the vault
external integration failures must not strand principal or corrupt accounting
position registry and external protocol state must remain synchronized
common_bug_classes: TVL omits staked LP or rewards
TVL counts liquidity not owned by the vault
position removed while external exposure remains
deposit/withdraw sends tokens to wrong receiver
external protocol recovery mode has special claim path
check_items: Enumerate every balance component controlled by the external protocol
Check add/decrease/transfer/close paths update registry symmetrically
Compare connector TVL to direct external protocol reads
Verify receiver address for minted/redeemed assets
Check special modes such as recovery mode, shutdown, paused, blacklisted, or gauge staking
test_ideas: open a multi-part external position and assert TVL equals ground truth
partially decrease a position and ensure registry remains active
fuzz receiver/account identifiers across connector calls
